title: Fix admin page authentication gate blocking access

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx`, completely remove all authentication checks, login gates, and any conditional rendering that blocks or restricts access to the /admin route. The page must render immediately on load without requiring Internet Identity login or any identity verification. Remove all references to `useInternetIdentity`, `isAuthenticated`, or any auth state that gates the display of content. Ensure `useGetAllSubmissions` is called unconditionally on mount and submissions are displayed as soon as the query resolves.

quotes: it's not allowing me to view admin

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin in a fresh browser session (not logged in) renders the admin page immediately with no login prompt or access-denied message
All booking submissions are fetched and displayed without any authentication step
No conditional rendering based on login/auth state exists in AdminPage.tsx
The page shows a loading indicator while submissions are being fetched
The page shows an empty-state message when no submissions exist
The page shows an error message if the query fails

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`, ensure the `useGetAllSubmissions` hook creates and uses a fully anonymous actor (no Internet Identity dependency) to call the `getAllSubmissions` backend query. The hook must not reference or depend on any auth state, must not wait for a logged-in identity, and must run the query automatically on mount. Correctly unpack the returned array of submission records.

quotes: it's not allowing me to view admin

acceptanceCriteria: useGetAllSubmissions does not import or use useInternetIdentity or any authenticated actor
The hook uses an anonymous HttpAgent to instantiate the backend actor
The query executes automatically without a manual trigger
Both empty arrays and populated arrays are handled correctly without runtime errors
The returned data is correctly typed and accessible in AdminPage.tsx

constraints: Do not add any authentication requirement to the /admin route
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not change the backend data model or Motoko actor logic
nonGoals: Adding role-based access control or admin password protection
Changing the visual design or card layout of the admin page
Modifying the booking form or any other page
